sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الأُسْرَةُ إِلَى الحَمَّامِ يَوْمَ الجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je otišla u hamam u petak.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to the hammam on Friday.
The hammam is close to the house.

sentences.translation: Svi su se osjetili čisto i opušteno.

sentences.arabic: الحَمَّامُ التُّرَاثِيُّ جُزْءٌ مِنَ الحَيَاةِ اليَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalni hamam je dio svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The traditional hammam is part of daily life.
